full_text:
Sima Ying (Zhangdu) 司馬穎 (章度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Ying (司馬穎), styledZhangdu (章度). The sixth of the Princes associated with the Turmoil of the Eight Princes. Sima Ying was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
